resources.string: Exclude فایلs and apps from SD Maid\'s operations.
A path exclusion prevents SD Maid from further processing any matching paths. This applies to فایلs, folder and sub-folders.
A segment based exclusion is similar to a path exclusion but allows for partial matches. نموونە: \"DCIM/Camera\" excludes \"/sdcard/DCIM/Camera/photo.png\".
Use the ئەپControl tool to create app exclusions.
Use the ناحیەکانAnalyzer tool to create path exclusions.
